hero_subtitle: A Ministry of Grace, Love and Compassion Holistic Outreach | Body • Soul • Spirit Serving with love. Restoring lives. Strengthening communities.
mission:
Our passion: Loving God, and others as He loves us! 

S.H.A.R.E Love stands for: 
S – Serving & Loving Others 
H – Holistic Care: Body, Soul & Spirit 
A – Advocating for the Vulnerable
R – Relationship Building
E – Education that Empowers
